theme: Push a chip game to its provable ceiling
title: Ember Kilns: Push the Firing Line to Its Ceiling
strategies: do nothing (empty move sequence; reproduces the checker baseline)
myopic hill-climb: repeatedly play the single legal move with the largest immediate yield gain until no improving move exists

reachable-class search: the moves conserve ember count and total cell-sum (a potential that partitions arrangements into reachable classes); BFS the reachable class, evaluate collected yield over the whole class, and route to its best member through loss/plateau moves

invariant-targeted planning: use the conserved potential (M, cell-sum, spread parity) to bound which high-yield cells are reachable, then plan a move sequence toward the best reachable class instead of chasing bait yields
